description_long: This object consists of two frying pans, each with a round, deep body and a long, straight handle extending from one side. The pans have a rich, reddish-brown color, suggesting a cast iron or enameled finish, and the handles appear to be made of a darker, possibly metal or coated material. The rims of both pans are straight and moderately thick, with no visible pouring spouts or reinforced edges. The handles are single, straight, and end in a small circular hole, likely for hanging. No visible brand logos or decorative markings are present on the pans or handles. The bottom surfaces of the pans appear smooth, with no visible ridges, patterns, or stamps.
description: A pair of reddish-brown, round frying pans with straight, dark handles and smooth, thick rims. Both pans feature a hanging hole at the end of the handle and lack visible logos or bottom patterns.
description_view_0: Two round, reddish-brown frying pans are shown from a side angle, highlighting their deep bodies and long, straight handles.
description_view_1: The pans are viewed from the handle end, showing the circular shape of the bodies and the small hanging holes at the handle tips.
description_view_2: A side view from the opposite direction, emphasizing the handles extending leftward and the uniform depth of the pans.
description_view_3: A direct view from the front of the handles, clearly displaying the circular hanging holes and the smooth, round pan bodies.
attribute_handle_type: Single, straight, dark metal handle with a circular hanging hole at the end; no visible ergonomic features or grip textures.
attribute_rim_design: Moderately thick, straight rim with no flaring, pouring spouts, or reinforced edges.
attribute_bottom_pattern: Smooth bottom surface with no visible patterns, ridges, or brand markings.
